media.purpose: Source inputs: books, audiobooks, podcasts, videos, movies, articles, courses, lectures, documentaries, interviews, conversations, papers, and other media.

fields.title: string
fields.creator: string
fields.type: book | audiobook | podcast | video | movie | article | course | lecture | documentary | interview | conversation | paper | other
fields.status: Want to Read | Consuming | Finished | Paused | Abandoned
fields.annotations: Annotation[] with optional philosophyStatus: raw | connected | questioned | used_in_position | archived

concepts.purpose: Encyclopedia entries and Atlas map nodes.

fields.name: string
fields.links: string[] concept names for saved concept links

fields.status: open | investigating | answered | archived | gathering_evidence | under_tension | partially_answered | resolved | reopened

vault.purpose: Positions: explicit beliefs, principles, mental models, life rules, and worldview statements.

fields.title: string
fields.status: draft | active | uncertain | challenged | revised | rejected | questioning | abandoned

drafts.purpose: Works: essays, scripts, field notes, voice notes, talk-to-text captures, drawings, and recordings.

fields.title: string
fields.type: essay | script | field_note | voice_note | talk_to_text | drawing | recording
fields.writingStyle: blank_paper | ruled_notebook | manuscript | cornell_notes | two_column_debate | dialectic | belief_audit | source_analysis | mind_map | timeline

externalDocFields.provider: google_docs | notion | dropbox_paper | microsoft_word | markdown | other
externalDocFields.title: string

practices.purpose: Behavior-facing outputs: habits, experiments, disciplines, commitments, observations, rules, and challenges.

fields.title: string
fields.type: habit | experiment | discipline | reflection_prompt | commitment | observation | rule | challenge
fields.status: proposed | planned | active | completed | failed | integrated | paused | abandoned

atlasMaps.purpose: Saved Atlas custom maps with user-selected nodes, typed user links, saved node positions, and optional auto-link filters.

fields.title: string
fields.nodePositions: Record<concept name, { x: number Atlas percent, y: number Atlas percent }>
fields.manualLinks: AtlasMapLink[] typed user-created links between map nodes

atlasMaps.linkTypes: supports | challenges | coheres | defines | refines | contradicts | exemplifies | inspired_by | tested_by | expressed_in | changed_by | examples | causes | questions | practices | relates | custom

timeline.purpose: Evolution/history events for concepts, sources, inquiries, positions, works, practices, and insights.

fields.entityType: media | vault | concept | question | draft | practice | insight | string
fields.eventType: created | refined | challenged | revised | expanded | abandoned

insights.purpose: Mirrored idea records for Atlas/concept linking when ideas become positions.

links.purpose: Typed philosophical relationships between sources, annotations, concepts, inquiries, positions, works, practices, and evolution events.

fields.fromType: source | annotation | concept | inquiry | position | work | practice | evolution
fields.toType: source | annotation | concept | inquiry | position | work | practice | evolution
fields.type: supports | challenges | coheres | defines | refines | contradicts | exemplifies | inspired_by | tested_by | expressed_in | changed_by

suggestions.purpose: AI suggestions stored separately until the user accepts, rejects, ignores, or acts on them.

fields.targetType: source | annotation | concept | inquiry | position | work | practice | evolution
fields.suggestionType: annotation_consequence | position_draft | typed_link | possible_tension | evolution_summary | daily_prompt
fields.title: string

fields.accentTheme: violet | sage | blue | amber | rose | mono

writingDefaults.type: essay | script | field_note | voice_note | talk_to_text | drawing | recording
writingDefaults.writingStyle: blank_paper | ruled_notebook | manuscript | cornell_notes | two_column_debate | dialectic | belief_audit | source_analysis | mind_map | timeline

profile.purpose: User profile details mirrored from Firebase Auth with Noesis-specific bio fields.
